\tzpentry{ID4199}{Magnetic Flux Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4199 introduces Magnetic Flux Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Phi = n\Phi_0, \quad \Phi_0 = \frac{h}{2e} \approx 2.07 \times 10^{-15} \text{ Wb} \end{equation}
